---
title: "Creating An Agent"
---

---
title: "Creating an Agent"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Agent-Builder/ymd1751972450042"
section: "Hyland Agent Builder"
---

To create a custom agent, complete the following steps:

1. On the Agent Library page, click on the Create New Agent button.
The Builder tab of the agent creation wizard is displayed.

![](data:image/gif;base64,)
2. Enter required information in the fields present.
1. Under Agent Name, enter your agent's name.
2. Under Agent Model, choose a LLM model you want your agent to use.
3. Under Agent Description, enter a short description of the agent's job to help users understand its purpose.
4. Under Instructions, click Add Input to specify what information your agent will receive when starting to perform a task and add a short instruction of what your agent should do to provide a satisfactory result. Input's format is especially important for task-oriented agents. Tip: You can click on the What are inputs? button to cause the short help panel to appear. Similar buttons below would also summon the help panel.
5. Under Outcomes, click Add Outcome to specify the expected output format your agent should provide as a result of its work. Optional for conversation-oriented agents. ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
3. Once everything is in place, click Deploy to complete the agent creation and to deploy the new agent.
